import React from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col, Card } from 'react-bootstrap'; const About = () => (

About Us

Who We Are BUKANI MAMA TOTO WOMEN GROUP is a local women-led organization focused on improving the lives of women and their families through sustainable fish farming. Our Mission To promote economic independence and food security for women and children in our community through environmentally responsible fishing. ); export default About;
